display.purpose: Selected-equipment name, fleet count, wordmark (Space Grotesk 700).

headline.purpose: Card equipment names, panel titles (Space Grotesk 600).

body.purpose: Alert messages, descriptive copy, empty states (Inter 400).

label.purpose: Tracked uppercase instrument legends — sensor labels, eyebrows (Inter 500).

mono.purpose: Every telemetry number — IDs, sensor values, %, timestamps (JetBrains Mono).

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation of white cards on the blue-tinted page (Tailwind shadow-sm).

shadows.name: toast-lift
shadows.purpose: The one floating overlay — result toasts (Tailwind shadow-md).

motion.name: pulse-critical
motion.purpose: Critical-count pill breathe; the only ambient motion, gated by reduced-motion.

components.name: Equipment Card
components.description: Primary interactive surface — keyboard-operable card per unit, status-tinted border + faint wash.
components.html: COMP-05HVAC Air Handler
components.css: .ds-eq-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #12233B; border: 1px solid rgba(22,163,74,0.25); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(18,35,59,0.06); transition: border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-eq-card:hover { border-color: rgba(29,78,216,0.4); } .ds-eq-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(29,78,216,0.4); } .ds-eq-id { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #5B7089; } .ds-eq-name { display: block; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button (Confirm)
components.description: Solid brand-blue action — armed 'Confirm reset' and failed-unit maintenance.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #1D4ED8; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: background 150ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(29,78,216,0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(29,78,216,0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button (Maintenance)
components.description: Quiet maintenance CTA on healthy/degraded units — brand-blue outline, fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1D4ED8; border: 1px solid rgba(29,78,216,0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 150ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(29,78,216,0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(29,78,216,0.5); }

components.name: Status Pill (Live)
components.description: Connection state — brand blue when live.
components.html: Live
components.css: .ds-pill-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(29,78,216,0.1); color: #1D4ED8; border: 1px solid rgba(29,78,216,0.3); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Result feedback for operator actions — white card, status icon, aria-live.
components.html: HVAC Air Handler serviced — fresh unit online
components.css: .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #DBE7F3; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(18,35,59,0.10); max-width: 20rem; } .ds-toast-msg { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #12233B; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: RUL Gauge
components.description: Signature 220 degree degradation arc — green to amber to red by remaining useful life. No glow.
components.html: <svg class="ds-rul" width="120" height="120" viewBox="0 0 120 120"><path d="M 19.6 81.4 A 45.6 45.6 0 1 1 100.4 81.4" fill="none" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="8.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 19.6 81.4 A 45.6 45.6 0 1 1 96 60" fill="none" stroke="#16A34A" stroke-width="8.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><text x="60" y="56" text-anchor="middle" fill="#16A34A" font-family="'Space Grotesk',sans-serif" font-size="21.6" font-weight="700">112</text><text x="60" y="77" text-anchor="middle" fill="#5B7089" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.8" letter-spacing="0.08em">CYCLES</text></svg>

narrative.overview: PharmaGuard is the display panel of a precision lab instrument, rendered for a bright pharma cleanroom rather than a dark control booth. The canvas is a blue-tinted white (#EEF4FB) and data sits on crisp white cards that lift with a soft neutral shadow. Brand blue (#1D4ED8) is the UI accent: it marks what you can touch and nothing else. Health is spoken in the clinical vocabulary — green, amber, red — so a well-running fleet reads calmly green, and severity earns attention only when a unit actually degrades. The signature element is the RUL degradation arc, an instrument readout, never a fitness ring or a percentage bar.
keyCharacteristics: Blue-tinted white canvas; white cards lift on a soft neutral shadow, not a glow.
Brand blue is a UI accent only; a healthy fleet reads green, never blue.
Status escalates green to amber to red on real severity, never for decoration.
Monospace for every number — telemetry reads as instrument output.
The RUL degradation arc is the signature, non-negotiable component.
Motion is reserved for meaning (the critical pulse, action feedback), never ambient.

rules.name: The Brand-Is-Not-Status Rule
rules.body: Blue means 'you can touch this', never 'this is healthy'. Health is green/amber/red only. If a healthy unit ever renders blue, that's a bug — a resting fleet reads green.

rules.name: The Clinical-Escalation Rule
rules.body: Status escalates green to amber to red and never skips a step or decorates with it. Amber and red on screen are signals, not styling.

rules.name: The Lit-Data-Is-Dead Rule
rules.body: This is a light theme: color belongs to data via solid fills and legible text, not glow. No drop-shadow/box-shadow in a status color to fake illumination.

rules.name: The Numbers-Are-Mono Rule
rules.body: Any value the model produces or the stream reports is set in JetBrains Mono. Prose is Inter, headings are Space Grotesk, data is mono — no exceptions.

rules.name: The Soft-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Cards lift on a soft neutral shadow, never a colored glow. If a shadow is tinted to a status color, it's wrong.

dos: Do keep the canvas blue-tinted white (#EEF4FB) and let white cards lift on a soft neutral shadow-sm.
Do reserve brand blue (#1D4ED8) for interactive/brand chrome — selection, focus, the primary action, the 'Live' pill — and never as a health color.
Do speak health in green/amber/red; a resting fleet reads green (#16A34A).
Do use the darker amber (#B45309) for amber text and the brighter #D97706 only for amber graphics, so text clears WCAG AA on white.
Do set every telemetry value in JetBrains Mono, and pair every status color with an icon or label (never color alone).
Do keep the RUL degradation arc as the signature readout, color-stepped, no glow.
Do guard the maintenance action with the inline confirm + result toast, and gate the critical pulse / spinners behind prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS dashboard — no templated card grids, no hero-metric stat tiles.
Don't drift toward the consumer fitness/IoT app — no playful gradients, no emoji, no gamified rings.
Don't look like enterprise SCADA / industrial HMI clutter — no gray gradients, no beveled skeuomorphic gauges.
Don't become a crypto/trading terminal — no ambient blinking; motion is for meaning only.
Don't reintroduce the dark-theme tropes this restyle removed: no neon glows (drop-shadow/box-shadow in a status color), no glassmorphism (backdrop-blur cards).
Don't use brand blue as a status color, or let a healthy unit render blue.
Don't use purple/violet anywhere — chart and accent colors are blue / green / amber / red / cyan only.
Don't use Deep Muted (#94A3B8) for body or label text — reserve it for disabled/dim glyphs and chart ticks.
Don't add background-clip: text gradients or border-left accent stripes.
